omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Business Transfers: Feedly may share or transfer Pl in connection with, any merger, sale of Feedly assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of the business to another company. Feedly may share or transfer Aggregated Information to affiliate or related companies for its business purposes.
